description: DC Hub tool declarations for Anthropic Claude tool use

tools.name: search_facilities
tools.description: Search DC Hub's database of 10,706+ data center facilities across 140+ countries. Returns facility name, operator, location, capacity, and tier.

q.description: Search query — operator name, city, or market

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (US, GB, DE, etc.)

market.description: Market name (Northern Virginia, Dallas-Fort Worth, etc.)

limit.description: Max results (default: 10, max: 100 on Pro tier)

tools.name: get_facility
tools.description: Get detailed profile for a single data center facility including power capacity, connectivity, certifications.

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Get market intelligence — vacancy rates, pricing, inventory, capacity under construction.

market.description: Market name (e.g., Northern Virginia, Phoenix, London)

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search M&A transactions from DC Hub's $185B+ deal database. Returns buyer, seller, price, MW capacity, price-per-MW.

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get latest data center industry news from 40+ sources.

topic.description: Filter by topic (M&A, construction, energy, etc.)

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Score a geographic location for data center suitability based on power, fiber, risk, and zoning factors.
